# hetzner_firewall_template (Resource)

Manages a reusable firewall template in the Hetzner Robot API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hetzner_firewall_template" "example" {
  name          = "web-server"
  filter_ipv6   = false
  allowlist_hos = true
  is_default    = false

  input = [{
    name       = "Allow SSH"
    ip_version = "ipv4"
    dst_port   = "22"
    protocol   = "tcp"
    action     = "accept"
    }, {
    name       = "Allow HTTPS"
    ip_version = "ipv4"
    dst_port   = "443"
    protocol   = "tcp"
    action     = "accept"
  }]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Template name.

### Optional

- `allowlist_hos` (Boolean) Allow Hetzner services.
- `filter_ipv6` (Boolean) Whether template filters IPv6 traffic.
- `input` (Attributes List) Incoming traffic rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input))
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default template.
- `output` (Attributes List) Outgoing traffic rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--output))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Template ID.

<a id="nestedatt--input"></a>
### Nested Schema for `input`

Required:

- `action` (String) Action: `accept` or `discard`.

Optional:

- `dst_ip` (String) Destination IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `dst_port` (String) Destination port or range.
- `ip_version` (String) IP version: `ipv4`, `ipv6`, or empty for both.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol: `tcp`, `udp`, `icmp`, etc.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `src_port` (String) Source port or range.
- `tcp_flags` (String) TCP flags.


<a id="nestedatt--output"></a>
### Nested Schema for `output`

Required:

- `action` (String) Action: `accept` or `discard`.

Optional:

- `dst_ip` (String) Destination IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `dst_port` (String) Destination port or range.
- `ip_version` (String) IP version: `ipv4`, `ipv6`, or empty for both.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol: `tcp`, `udp`, `icmp`, etc.
- `src_ip` (String) Source IP/subnet in CIDR notation.
- `src_port` (String) Source port or range.
- `tcp_flags` (String) TCP flags.
